title: Garlicky Shaggy Spanish Turkey Neck Paella
description: A nostalgic Spanish dish featuring turkey neck, rice, and vegetables, all combined in a garlicky and flavorful way.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Sear the turkey necks until browned on all sides, then set aside.
Add the minced garlic and sauté until fragrant.
Add the sliced red onion and cook until translucent.
Add the Arborio rice and stir to coat with the oil and mix with the vegetables.
Add the smoked paprika, saffron, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the chicken broth, 2 cups of water, and the turkey necks to the pan.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Stir in the chopped artichoke hearts and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Serve the paella hot, garnished with lemon wedges and chopped fresh parsley.
